label: agent-flow after 5 fixes, before DDD refactor
source: manual — measured in chat session, quality from code review
notes: This is the sweet-spot baseline. Applied 5 fixes: (1) message-level cache_control, (2) eager_input_streaming, (3) token-based recency eviction, (4) 1h TTL for project sessions, (5) cache hit rate in debug. Also fixed: Filter bug in OAuth stable/volatile split, oauthInjectionTracker retry reset. System prompt ~4.3k tokens.
fixes: Fix 1: message-level cache_control on last user message block
Fix 2: eager_input_streaming: true on tool definitions
Fix 3: token-based recency window (keepRecentTokens: 20000) replacing 3-turn hard cap
Fix 4: 1h TTL cache for project sessions (AGENT_FLOW_CACHE_RETENTION or .agent-flow dir)
Fix 5: cache hit rate shown in debug output
Fix A: stable/volatile system prompt filter bug (cacheControl !== undefined)
Fix B: oauthInjectionTracker snapshot before retry loop

C1_lruCache.qualityNotes: Sentinel-node doubly-linked list. Full generics. RangeError validation. 8 test suites: constructor validation, basic get/put, LRU eviction order, key update+promotion, clear, capacity-1 edge case, complex object generics, repeated-gets-no-inflate. Code reviewed manually — correct.

C2_rateLimiter.qualityNotes: Correct token-bucket with lazy refill (no background timer). RateLimiterOptions interface. Validates rate, capacity, and consume args. Default consume(tokens=1). 5 test suites. Code reviewed manually — correct.

C3_eventEmitter.qualityNotes: ListenerEntry.once flag approach (clean, no wrapper overhead). Conditional tuple type for void events: emit('ready') compiles without data arg. Snapshot-before-iterate. EventMap=Record<string|symbol, unknown>. Removes empty arrays from Map. listenerCount added.

overallQuality.basis: All 3 tasks reviewed from written files
strengths: void event handling via conditional tuple type in emit()
Sentinel nodes with no null-checks needed
Lazy refill pattern in rate limiter (no background timer)
8 test suites for LRU covering edge cases
weaknesses: Tests not auto-run during task (no compiler verification turn)
No injectable clock in rate limiter (harder to test time-based behaviour)
